title: Aureline AI evidence-packet contract
description: Boundary schema for the ai_evidence_packet_record, the ai_tainted_content_fence_record, the ai_evidence_source_reference_record, and the ai_evidence_audit_event_record frozen in docs/ai/context_assembly_contract.md. Every dispatched AI turn (inline, background branch-agent, or review-handoff) produces exactly one ai_evidence_packet_record that links the assembly, the route / spend receipts, the branch-agent dispatch (when applicable), every tainted content fence, and every source reference that backed a user-visible claim. Raw retrieved-document bodies, raw terminal / log bodies, raw generated artifact bytes, raw request / response payloads, raw user-supplied text, raw prompt text, and raw credential material never cross the RPC boundary; this schema carries ids and typed vocabulary only. Adding a new source-class, trust-posture, fence strategy, usage constraint, or denial reason is additive-minor and requires an ai_evidence_packet_schema_version bump; repurposing an existing value is breaking and requires a new decision row.

ai_evidence_packet_schema_version.description: Integer schema version for this AI evidence-packet vocabulary export. Current value is 1. Bumped only on breaking payload changes; additive-optional fields do not bump this version.

record_kind.description: Discriminator for the concrete payload shape. Every record carries exactly one kind.

opaque_id.description: Opaque, stable id safe to log, safe on RPC, safe in manifests / journal entries / support bundles / claim manifests. Raw bodies, raw paths, raw URLs, raw prompt text, raw credential material, and raw generated artifact bytes never appear here.

monotonic_timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp produced from a monotonic clock source.

tainted_source_class.description: Frozen tainted-source-class vocabulary. Every tainted_content_fence names exactly one source class. The set is closed; a surface that observes an unrecognised tainted source MUST deny with tainted_source_class_unresolved rather than silently classify.

tainted_trust_posture.description: Frozen tainted-trust-posture vocabulary. Re-exports the untrusted_* and policy_quarantined and unreviewed_derived postures from context_assembly.schema.json so downstream evidence consumers read one vocabulary.

tainted_fence_strategy.description: Frozen tainted-content fence-strategy vocabulary. Re-exported from context_assembly.schema.json without modification.

tainted_usage_constraint.description: Frozen tainted-usage-constraint vocabulary. Re-exported from context_assembly.schema.json without modification.

evidence_claim_class.description: Frozen evidence-claim-class vocabulary. Every ai_evidence_source_reference_record names exactly one class; surfaces that invent surface-local references (free-form strings, raw URLs) are non-conforming.

evidence_source_posture.description: Frozen source-posture vocabulary for evidence references. tainted_external is the only value permitted on a reference whose bytes came through a tainted source; downstream readers use this to decide how to render the reference.

evidence_audit_event_id.description: Frozen audit-event ids on the ai_evidence audit stream. Events MUST NOT carry raw bodies, raw paths, raw URLs, raw prompt text, or raw credential material.

evidence_denial_reason.description: Frozen denial-reason vocabulary. Denials fail closed; silent downgrade to a best-effort evidence packet is forbidden.

redaction_class.description: Re-exported from schemas/governance/capability_lifecycle.schema.json without modification (ADR-0011). The broker-owned redaction pass (ADR-0007) runs before bytes reach any persistent or exportable sink.

trust_state.description: ADR-0001 workspace-trust state at the moment the record was minted.

execution_context_id.description: ADR-0009 execution-context id when the record was minted inside a live execution. Null when the record was minted outside an execution context.

policy_context.description: Policy context the record was minted under.

segment_id_ref.description: Opaque reference to the ai_context_segment_record the fence applies to. A fence without a segment reference is non-conforming.

source_reference_refs.description: Opaque references to the ai_evidence_source_reference_record entries the fence covers (if any). Empty when the fence covers a segment that carries no user-visible citation (e.g. user-supplied text included as fenced data).

usage_constraints.description: Constraints the composer plan applied at assembly time. Every constraint is carried forward into downstream branch-agent dispatches, review handoffs, and nested evidence packets; a handoff that drops a constraint is denied with tainted_fence_dropped_on_handoff.

preserved_markings.description: Opaque labels preserved on the fenced content for downstream render / review (e.g. 'external-sandboxed', 'data-only', 'summary-only'). Strings are stable label ids, not free-form prose.

ai_tainted_content_fence_record.description: Typed tainted-content fence covering a segment in the assembly. Every tainted segment in the originating assembly (ai_context_assembly_record) MUST have exactly one ai_tainted_content_fence_record on the evidence packet; a missing fence is non-conforming.

target_ref.description: Opaque reference to the typed target the evidence reference points at. Raw paths, raw URLs, raw bodies never appear.

segment_id_ref.description: Opaque reference to the ai_context_segment_record that produced this reference, when the reference is tied to a specific segment.

citation_anchor_refs.description: Anchor ids from schemas/docs/help_status_badge.schema.json that back an authoritative claim. Required (non-empty) when claim_class ∈ {docs_anchor_reference, generated_reference_reference, runbook_step_reference, release_note_reference} and source_posture ∈ {trusted_first_party, trusted_authority, reviewed_derived}.

tainted_fence_ref.description: Required (non-null) when source_posture = tainted_external. Points at the ai_tainted_content_fence_record that covers the source.

allOf.description: tainted_fence_ref MUST be non-null when source_posture = tainted_external.
citation_anchor_refs MUST be non-empty on authoritative docs / generated-reference / runbook / release-note claims with a trusted source posture.

ai_evidence_source_reference_record.description: Typed evidence reference. Every user-visible claim that later review / support / audit might recompute points at its backing reference through this record.

route_receipt_ref.description: Opaque reference to the ai_route_receipt_record recorded at dispatch. Required (non-null) for every evidence packet whose dispatch_target_class is not support_replay_only; a missing ref is denied with route_receipt_ref_missing.

spend_receipt_ref.description: Opaque reference to the ai_spend_receipt_record. Required (non-null) for every evidence packet whose dispatch_target_class is not support_replay_only; a missing ref is denied with spend_receipt_ref_missing.

tool_call_lineage_refs.description: Opaque references to ai_tool_call_lineage_record entries associated with the turn. Every tool-call return that was treated as tainted MUST have a corresponding tainted_fence_ref on this packet.

tainted_fence_count.description: Count of ai_tainted_content_fence_record entries on the packet. A tainted_segment_count on the originating assembly that exceeds tainted_fence_count here is non-conforming (the packet is missing fences).

required_count.description: Count of source references that require a citation anchor under the rules in this schema (authoritative docs / generated-reference / runbook / release-note with trusted posture).

provided_count.description: Count of source references that actually provide a non-empty citation_anchor_refs array.

citation_anchor_coverage.description: Summary of citation-anchor coverage. required_count > provided_count is non-conforming and denies the packet with citation_anchor_missing_on_authoritative_claim.

downstream_handoff_refs.description: Opaque references to downstream packets the evidence was handed off to (review / diff canvas packets, mutation-journal entries, support bundles, claim manifests, nested evidence packets on dependent branch-agent dispatches). Every handoff MUST preserve every tainted_usage_constraint the packet carries; a dropped constraint denies the handoff with tainted_fence_dropped_on_handoff.

running_build_identity_ref.description: Opaque pin to the running build's exact-build identity (D-0011).

allOf.description: branch_agent_dispatch_ref MUST be non-null when dispatch_target_class = background_branch_agent.
review_handoff_ref MUST be non-null when dispatch_target_class = review_handoff.
route_receipt_ref and spend_receipt_ref MUST be non-null unless dispatch_target_class = support_replay_only.

ai_evidence_packet_record.description: Per-turn AI evidence packet. Links the assembly, the route / spend receipts, the branch-agent dispatch (when applicable), every tainted content fence, and every source reference that backed a user-visible claim. Raw bodies, raw paths, raw URLs, raw prompt text, and raw credential material never appear.

denial_reason.description: Required (non-null) on ai_evidence_tainted_fence_dropped_denial, ai_evidence_citation_anchor_missing_denial, and ai_evidence_receipt_missing_denial events.

allOf.description: denial_reason MUST be non-null for *_denial audit events.

ai_evidence_audit_event_record.description: Audit event emitted on the ai_evidence audit stream. Events MUST NOT carry raw bodies, raw paths, raw URLs, raw prompt text, or raw credential material.
